description: Remove any custom baml generator module. Update #[rlm_type] to inject #[derive(baml_bridge::BamlType)] so users don't add it manually. BamlType impls come from baml-bridge-derive, not rlm-derive.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 1.7): stop custom BamlType codegen; use `baml-bridge-derive`.
- Remove any `baml` generator module.
- `#[rlm_type]` injects `#[derive(baml_bridge::BamlType, RlmType)]`.
- `rlm_type.rs` should only emit pyclass + describe impls (no BamlType impls).

title: Task 1.7: Use baml-bridge-derive instead of custom BamlType codegen
